parameters.formDescription: Enter test data to simulate a DPS alert email

parameters.jsCode:
const parsed = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...parsed, exception: true, exception_type: 'missing_station_code', exception_reason: 'No station code provided' } }];

const parsed = $input.first().json;
return parsed.member_codes.map(code => ({ json: { station_code: code, root: parsed } }));
